name: Harbor 9 Golf & Sports Bar
about: Harbor 9 Golf & Sports Bar is a year-round golf simulation venue featuring state-of-the-art Trackman simulators in Gloucester, MA. The venue combines a modern sports bar atmosphere with advanced golf technology, offering an immersive experience for both serious golfers and casual players. With six simulator bays and a dedicated VIP bay that seats up to eight, it provides a flexible environment for practice, play, and social gatherings, featuring a full kitchen and bar service.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading Trackman radar technology for precise swing and ball flight analysis
Year-round access to world-renowned golf courses regardless of weather
VIP bay accommodating up to 8 people for group events and competitions
Welcoming atmosphere with a full bar and kitchen for a complete experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with a menu featuring items like smoked wings
Full bar service with a solid whiskey list and other beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Cutting-edge radar technology providing detailed analysis of swing and ball flight

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, Harbor 9 has an in-house kitchen and full bar, and there are no mentions of a BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, 18 holes typically take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and simulator pace.

faq.question: Is Harbor 9 kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue has a family-friendly atmosphere with activities like Mario Kart and a sports bar environment, making it suitable for kids.
